vulnerability.reference: Human perception is acutely sensitive to sub-100ms audiovisual asynchrony in speech.
vulnerability.generated: Meeting participants rely on accurate lip-sync for speech comprehension in virtual settings, leaving them vulnerable to miscommunication when visual cues drift.

impact.reference: Confusion and miscommunication erode meeting efficiency and trust.
impact.generated: Communication breakdowns lead to misunderstanding, repeated clarifications, and degraded meeting effectiveness across distributed teams.

dose_response.reference: Error accumulation in sequential diffusion-based talking face generation enables temporal drift, which in personalized avatar meetings exposes participants to audiovisual asynchrony, leading to confusion and reduced trust.
dose_response.generated: Error accumulation in sequential diffusion-based talking face generation, through meeting participants viewing AI-generated video feeds, triggers reliance on accurate lip-sync for speech comprehension, leaving them vulnerable to miscommunication, leading to misunderstanding, repeated clarifications, and degraded meeting effectiveness across distributed teams.
